prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for aniline computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') with PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The calculation evaluated the neutral molecule and its N−1 cation (doublet) and N+1 anion (doublet) to derive per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor via Mulliken partial-charge analysis. The most electrophilic site is C3 (ortho position) with f⁺ = 2.298, and the most nucleophilic is N1 with f⁻ = 0.205. All charge-conservation checks passed; SCF converged. Input geometry from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz (single-point, not re-optimized at DFT). The calculated indices reflect aniline's known electrophilicity at the aromatic ortho/para carbons due to resonance activation by the amine donor. No warnings reported.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.298
